headline: FactSet (NYSE:FDS) Beats Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations, Stock Soars
summary: Financial data provider FactSet (NYSE:FDS) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 7.1% year on year to $611 million. The company expects the full year’s revenue to be around $2.46 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.46 per share was 1.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: FactSet (NYSE:FDS) Beats Q1 CY2026 Sales Expectations, Stock Soars
content.summary: Financial data provider FactSet (NYSE:FDS) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 7.1% year on year to $611 million. The company expects the full year’s revenue to be around $2.46 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.46 per share was 1.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: FactSet Reports Results for Second Quarter 2026
summary: Q2 GAAP revenues of $611.0 million, up 7.1% from Q2 2025.Organic ASV was $2,449.1 million at February 28, 2026, up 6.7% year over year.Q2 GAAP operating margin of 30.3%, down approximately 220 bps year over year.Q2 adjusted operating margin of 35.0%, down 230 bps year over year.Q2 GAAP diluted EPS of $3.59, down 4.5% from the prior year, and Q2 adjusted diluted EPS of $4.46, up 4.2% year over year.Fiscal 2026 guidance updated. headline: Is It Time To Reconsider FactSet Research Systems (FDS) After A 54% Share Price Decline?
summary: Wondering if FactSet Research Systems at around US$204.55 is starting to look interesting on value, or if the recent share price history is a warning sign you should not ignore. The stock has seen a 1.9% decline over the last 7 days, a 5.7% decline over 30 days and a much steeper 28.2% decline year to date, with a 54.4% decline over the past year adding to questions about how the market is pricing it. Those moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing attention on data and analytics providers,...

headline: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: CoreWeave, Microsoft, McCormick, Constellation, Biogen, Marvell, and More
summary: Stocks were rising Tuesday following a report that said President Donald Trump told aides he was willing to end the war in Iran even if the U.S. and its allies fail to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.  The facility received an A3 rating from  Moody’s  marking the first time a loan backed by high-performance computing infrastructure has achieved investment-grade status.  Microsoft  advanced 1.6% after the tech giant said it would invest more than $1 billion in cloud and artificial intelligence infrastructure in Thailand between 2026 and 2028.

content.title: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: CoreWeave, Microsoft, McCormick, Constellation, Biogen, Marvell, and More
content.summary: Stocks were rising Tuesday following a report that said President Donald Trump told aides he was willing to end the war in Iran even if the U.S. and its allies fail to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.  The facility received an A3 rating from  Moody’s  marking the first time a loan backed by high-performance computing infrastructure has achieved investment-grade status.  Microsoft  advanced 1.6% after the tech giant said it would invest more than $1 billion in cloud and artificial intelligence infrastructure in Thailand between 2026 and 2028.

headline: FactSet’s 2026 Upgrade And New AI Tools Might Change The Case For Investing In FDS
summary: FactSet Research Systems recently raised its fiscal 2026 guidance, now targeting GAAP revenues of US$2.45 billion–US$2.47 billion and GAAP diluted EPS of US$14.85–US$15.35, alongside ongoing share repurchases and mixed second-quarter earnings, where sales grew but net income and EPS were lower than a year earlier. At the same time, FactSet expanded its AI footprint by launching the alpha version of FactSet AI for Banking and partnering with Finster AI, aiming to make its data and tools...
